title: managedDevice
description: Devices that are managed or pre-enrolled through Intune. Represents a physical or virtual device managed by the Intune service.

id.description: Unique identifier for the device. Read-only.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the device. Read-only.

managedDeviceOwnerType.description: Ownership of the device. Can be company or personal.

enrolledDateTime.description: Enrollment time of the device. Read-only.

lastSyncDateTime.description: The date and time that the device last completed a successful sync with Intune. Read-only.

operatingSystem.description: Operating system of the device (Windows, iOS, etc.). Read-only.

jailBroken.description: Whether the device is jail broken or rooted. Read-only.

managementAgent.description: Management channel of the device (Intune, EAS, etc.).

osVersion.description: Operating system version of the device. Read-only.

easActivated.description: Whether the device is Exchange ActiveSync activated. Read-only.

easDeviceId.description: Exchange ActiveSync Id of the device. Read-only.

easActivationDateTime.description: Exchange ActivationSync activation time of the device. Read-only.

azureADRegistered.description: Whether the device is Azure Active Directory registered. Read-only.

deviceEnrollmentType.description: Enrollment type of the device. Read-only.

activationLockBypassCode.description: The code that allows the Activation Lock on managed device to be bypassed. Read-only.

emailAddress.description: Email(s) for the user associated with the device. Read-only.

azureADDeviceId.description: The unique identifier for the Azure Active Directory device. Read-only.

exchangeLastSuccessfulSyncDateTime.description: Last time the device contacted Exchange. Read-only.

exchangeAccessState.description: The Access State of the device in Exchange. Read-only.

exchangeAccessStateReason.description: The reason for the device's access state in Exchange. Read-only.

remoteAssistanceSessionUrl.description: URL that allows a Remote Assistance session to be established with the device. Read-only.

remoteAssistanceSessionErrorDetails.description: An error string that identifies issues when creating Remote Assistance session objects. Read-only.

complianceGracePeriodExpirationDateTime.description: The DateTime when device compliance grace period expires. Read-only.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the device. Read-only.

managedDeviceName.description: Automatically generated name to identify a device. Can be overwritten to a user friendly name.

partnerReportedThreatState.description: Indicates the threat state of a device when a Mobile Threat Defense partner is in use. Read-only.

requireUserEnrollmentApproval.description: Reports if the managed iOS device is user approval enrollment. Read-only.

managementCertificateExpirationDate.description: Reports device management certificate expiration date. Read-only.

iccid.description: Integrated Circuit Card Identifier - a SIM card's unique identification number. Read-only.

udid.description: Unique Device Identifier for iOS and macOS devices. Read-only.

notes.description: Notes on the device created by IT Admin.

ethernetMacAddress.description: Ethernet MAC Address of the device. Read-only.

enrollmentProfileName.description: Name of the enrollment profile assigned to the device. Read-only.
